title: Wyper Pushes the War Forward
description: Enel’s power and authority become clearer as Skypiea’s people and warriors are forced to live under his judgment.
scene: Across pages 5, 6, 7, 8, this scene centers on Enel, Eneru, Wyper, Shandia warrior, Gan Fall. Enel’s power and authority become clearer as Skypiea’s people and warriors are forced to live under his judgment.

dialogue.speaker: Enel
dialogue.text: I was... until six years ago...

dialogue.speaker: Wyper
dialogue.text: Those residents were called the shandians.

dialogue.speaker: Eneru
dialogue.text: So then it's all your fault!!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: It is as you have said...

summary: Enel’s power and authority become clearer as Skypiea’s people and warriors are forced to live under his judgment.
